targets.rawSql:
WITH top_sql AS 
(  SELECT sql_id, AVG(rows_processed) AS rows_processed  
FROM awr_sql_executions  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND dbname = '$dbname'    AND instance = '$instance'    
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int  
AND executions > 10000 
GROUP BY sql_id  
ORDER BY    CASE      WHEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int = split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int        
THEN MAX(rows_processed)      
ELSE AVG(rows_processed)    
END DESC  LIMIT 10) 
SELECT   s.sql_id,  SUM(s.executions) AS executions,  ROUND(AVG(s.pct_cpu),2) AS pct_cpu,  ROUND(AVG(s.pct_io),2) AS pct_io,  ROUND(AVG(s.rows_processed),4) AS rows_processed 
FROM awr_sql_executions s 
JOIN top_sql t ON t.sql_id = s.sql_id 
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'  
AND instance = '$instance'  
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
GROUP BY s.sql_id 
ORDER BY rows_processed DESC;

WITH top_sql AS 
(  SELECT sql_id  
FROM awr_sql_executions  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND dbname = '$dbname'     AND instance = '$instance'     
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND executions > 10000    
GROUP BY sql_id   
ORDER BY     CASE       WHEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int = split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int         
THEN MAX(rows_processed)       
ELSE AVG(rows_processed)     END DESC   LIMIT 10 ) 
SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.sql_id)   t.sql_id,  x.sql_text 
FROM top_sql t 
JOIN awr_sql_text x ON x.sql_id = t.sql_id 
WHERE x.dbname = '$dbname' 
ORDER BY t.sql_id, x.id DESC;

list.description: Portal URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Grafana URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url

list.label: Database
list.name: dbname
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.label: Instance
list.name: instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.label: Start Snap
list.name: start_snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.label: End Snap
list.name: end_snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

title: fdv3.1 SQL Ordered by Executions- Top 10
